src: Futurehome add-on for Home Assistant. Designed to be a complete drop-in replacement for the official Futurehome app, with support for all device types compatible with the Futurehome hub. See the FAQ for more details.
ja: Home Assistant向けFuturehomeアドオン。公式Futurehomeアプリの完全な代替として設計されており、Futurehomeハブ対応の全デバイスタイプをサポート。詳細はFAQ参照。
